name: Cod-Potato Casserole
recipeIngredient: 3 medium potatoes, peeled and sliced (1 lb.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the salt cod in water overnight, changing the water 3 or 4 times.
2. Rinse the cod. In a saucepan, cover the cod with cold water and bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat, simmer, covered for 20 minutes or until the fish flakes.
4. Drain the cod. Meanwhile, in another pan, cook the onion in oil until tender but not brown.
5. Stir in tomato, broth, parsley, and pepper. Simmer uncovered for 15 minutes.
6. Flake the drained cod and gently stir into the tomato mixture along with the potatoes.
7. Pour into an ungreased 1 1/2 quart casserole. Bake covered for 1 1/4 to 1 1/2 hours at 350 degrees. Stir once or twice.
